content.problemStatement:
Consider an integer sequence BBB of length MMM. We define a few terms.

A two-partition of BBB is an ordered pair of non-empty sets (S,T)(S, T)(S,T) satisfying the following conditions:


S‚à™T={1,2,3,‚Ä¶,M}S\cup T = \{1, 2, 3, \ldots, M\}S‚à™T={1,2,3,‚Ä¶,M}
S‚à©T=‚àÖS\cap T = \emptysetS‚à©T=‚àÖ
The score of a two-partition P=(S,T)P = (S, T)P=(S,T) is defined as score(P):=min‚Å°i‚ààS(Bi)√ómax‚Å°j‚ààT(Bj)\text{score}(P) := \min_{i\in S} (B_i) \times \max_{j\in T} (B_j)score(P):=mini‚ààS‚Äã(Bi‚Äã)√ómaxj‚ààT‚Äã(Bj‚Äã).

That is, the score of a two-partition is the product of the smallest element among the indices of SSS, and the largest element among the indices of TTT.

Finally, define f(B)f(B)f(B) to be the sum of scores of all two-partitions of BBB.

You are given an array AAA of length NNN.

Your task is to process the following QQQ updates to it:


Given xxx and vvv, set AxA_xAx‚Äã to vvv.
Output f(A)f(A)f(A) initially and also after each update.

Since the values of f(A)f(A)f(A) can be large, compute them modulo 998244353998244353998244353.

‚ÄÝ^\dagger‚ÄÝ A sequence bbb is a subsequence of an array aaa if bbb can be obtained from aaa by deleting some (possibly zero or all) elements.


Input Format

The first line of input will contain a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
Each test case consists of multiple lines of input.

The first line of each test case contains two space-separated integers NNN and QQQ ‚Äî the length of the array and the number of queries, respectively.
The second line contains NNN space-separated integers A1,A2,‚Ä¶,ANA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_NA1‚Äã,A2‚Äã,‚Ä¶,AN‚Äã ‚Äî the initial values of the array.
The next QQQ lines describe the updates. The iii-th of these lines contains two space-separated integers xix_ixi‚Äã and viv_ivi‚Äã, the parameters for the iii-th update.




Output Format
Print Q+1Q+1Q+1 integers: the value of f(A)f(A)f(A) initially and after each update.
constraints: The sum of NNN and the sum of QQQ over all test cases both won't exceed 2‚ãÖ1052\cdot 10^52‚ãÖ105.

S={3}S = \{3\}S={3}, T={1,2}T = \{1, 2\}T={1,2}, score=2\text{score} = 2score=2
